# Beauty with EVE

> Personal colour analysis and corporate image consulting by Evelynn Koo — Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

Beauty with EVE is the personal brand of Evelynn Koo, a certified personal colour analyst and HRD Corp accredited trainer based in Kuala Lumpur. She uses the 12-season colour analysis method to help individuals and organisations discover the palettes that work best for them.

## About Evelynn Koo

- Certified Personal Colour Analyst (trained under a South Korean expert)
- Senior Corporate Consultant — HRD Corp accredited Trainer (Train-the-Trainer certified)
- Has empowered 200+ individuals through events and 1-on-1 sessions
- Head of Operation at déBeau Beauty Academy
- Contact: evelynnkoo@gmail.com

## Services

### For Individuals
- **Signature Draping Session** — From RM 450. Comprehensive 2-hour 1-on-1 personal colour analysis using 12-season luxury fabric drapes. Includes digital colour palette guide, makeup/jewellery recommendations, Personal Colour Card and Consultation Report.

### For Organisations and Event Organisers
- **Retail Events** — From RM 1,500 per session. Live colour analysis activation on an event floor. Serves 15–30 guests per 4-hour session. Each guest receives a 10–15 min consultation with product colour recommendations tied to the brand's range. Post-event guest summary report included. Half-day or full-day options. Co-branded Colour Cards available.
- **Drape Party** — From RM 1,200 per session. Intimate group experience for 4–12 guests, 3–4 hours. Includes colour theory presentation, 1:1 draping, Personal Colour Card and Consultation Report Card per guest.
- **Team Workshop** — From RM 3,500 per session. Structured 3-hour programme for 50–100 pax. Colour theory presentation, live draping demo, Personal Colour Self-check Kit per attendee. HRDC/PSMB levy claimable — full documentation provided (invoice, attendance sheet, certificate of completion).
- **Corporate Consultation** — From RM 500. 90-minute advisory session for brand managers, event planners, and HR leads to plan an activation format before committing to a booking.

## Event Portfolio

- **JD Sports — Colour Analysis Event** (March 15, 2026, Pavilion Kuala Lumpur): Retail activation on the JD Sports event floor. Guests received colour consultations with activewear shade recommendations from the JD Sports range.
- **Shu Uemura — Colour Analysis Event** (March 14, 2026, Mid Valley Megamall): Counter-side activation at Shu Uemura. Foundation undertone, lip, blush, and eye shade recommendations matched to each guest's colour season.

## Key Information for Event Organisers

- **Geographic coverage**: Based in Kuala Lumpur. All Klang Valley events at no travel cost. Penang, Johor, and other cities available — travel quoted separately.
- **Lead time**: Personal sessions — 1 week. Corporate events — 2–3 weeks. HRDC workshops — 3 weeks minimum.
- **Setup requirements (Retail Events)**: approx. 1.5 × 1.5 m table space, natural or daylight-balanced lighting preferred.
- **Booking process**: Submit enquiry → briefing call → proposal + deposit → event day → post-event report within 3 business days.
